events.visible_state_change: The performer sits still with a neutral expression and direct eyeline.
The performer hears an off-screen name and shifts attention slightly left.
Recognition becomes visible as the eyes widen and the brow lifts.
A restrained smile appears while the performer keeps the new eyeline.
The performer exhales and the shoulders relax without changing position.
The performer holds the gentle smile and leftward eyeline in a stable final beat.

primary_move.start_framing: Medium close-up with both eyes and shoulders unobstructed.
primary_move.path: Straight, shallow move toward the performer.
primary_move.subject_relationship: The eyeline and expression remain readable throughout the move.
primary_move.endpoint_framing: Tight close-up holding the settled smile and both eyes.

occlusion_risks: The push-in could crop the eyes before the expression settles.
mitigations: End with visible margin above the brow and below the chin.

audio_events.description: The performer quietly says one short word at the attention shift.

requested_invariants.description: Identity remains stable and the final leftward eyeline does not revert.

known_fragilities.description: The recognition and smile may merge before the state change can be read.

acceptance_tests.observable: The eye and brow change is visible before the smile appears.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: Recognition and response remain two ordered, readable beats.

acceptance_tests.observable: The final smile and leftward eyeline hold without drift.
acceptance_tests.pass_condition: The endpoint remains visually stable through the final beat.

post_fallbacks.action: If the two expression beats merge, shorten the response hold without inventing a new state change.
